compressed_prompt: Write email to boss with <<title>> no commas
response:
Here is an email to a boss with a title that has no commas:

Subject: Notification of Progress

Dear Mr Smith

I am writing to inform you that the project is proceeding as planned. We have completed the initial phase and are now moving on to the next stage.

The team has worked diligently to meet the deadline and I am confident that we will deliver the final product on time.

Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns.

Best regards,
John Doe
